title: 红石生电极速版【Redstone speed version】
description: An integrated package specifically for Redstone players, retaining the vanilla gameplay and greatly improving FPS!
body:
专门给红石玩家使用的整合包，保留原版玩法且大幅提升FPS！

这是红石生电优化【Redstone Survival Optimization】https://modrinth.com/modpack/rso
的精简与极速版，保留原有功能的基础上大大提高了游戏的帧率！主要采用了VulkanMod模组做的渲染优化。所以没有光影，整合包包含生存玩家和红石玩家所需要的一些必要mod如，Carpet，Litematica，Tweakeroo，MiniHUD，Item Scroller。


An integrated package specifically for Redstone players, retaining the original gameplay and greatly improving FPS!

This is Redstone Survival Optimization [https://modrinth.com/modpack/rso](https://modrinth.com/modpack/rso)
The streamlined and extremely fast version of the game greatly improves the frame rate of the game while retaining the original functions! The rendering optimization is mainly used by VulkanMod module. So there is no light and shadow, and the integrated package contains some necessary mods needed by survival players and Redstone players such as Carpet, Litematica, Tweakeroo, MiniHUD, Item Scroller.
